name: Diamond Claws Protocol
description: DeFi protocol for DCLAW token: ERC-20 with staking rewards, MEV-protected swaps via Uniswap v4, and concentrated liquidity.

services.name: DCLAW Token
services.description: Diamond Claws ERC-20 token with ERC-2612 permit support, buy/sell taxes, and burnable supply.

services.name: DCLAW Staking
services.description: Stake DCLAW tokens to earn minted rewards. Supports operator delegation for smart account agents.

services.name: DCLAW MEV-Protected Swap
services.description: Uniswap v4 hook for batched, MEV-protected swaps. Exact-input swaps are queued and executed by a keeper.

services.name: DCLAW/ETH Liquidity
services.description: Concentrated liquidity provision for DCLAW/ETH via Uniswap v4. Supports operator delegation for smart account agents.

authentication.description: Supports both EOA (ECDSA) and smart account (ERC-1271) signature verification.

x402.description: x402 payment protocol for purchasing DCLAW tokens.
